findings.description: No rule rows exist at all for this blob despite an explicit [IMPORTANT] heading describing a fully-specified CTA section (background gradient/fallback color, headline styling, button styling). This entire compliance unit was never clustered into a brand_rule.

payload.statement: Gradient Callout CTA section layout: full-width banner with orange/yellow gradient background (fallback #faa31b), headline in Brand Blue #00529b Nunito Sans 800 ~28px top third, button 248x64px Deep Blue #003D74 fill, white Nunito Sans 800 18px label, Gold #FFC20E arrow after two nbsp.

findings.description: The mandatory, never-change button border-radius rule (four-value asymmetric radius, required on every instance even when background skipped) is a hard, non-negotiable governance rule with explicit prohibitions (never simplify, swap corners, round decimals) — this must be its own rule row with hardness=hard and explicit prohibition facets, not omitted.

payload.statement: Button border-radius must always be exactly `49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px` on every instance (even if background is skipped); never simplify to a single value, swap corners, or round decimals.

findings.description: The background-skip fallback condition (rare cases: plain-text/AMP, image-stripping client, size budget) with exact required MJML attribute removals (background-url, background-size, background-repeat, background-position; keep background-color, headline color, button color/radius) is a distinct conditional governance rule that must be captured separately from the main layout rule, including its scope trigger and exception conditions.

payload.statement: Background image may only be skipped in very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, image-stripping client, hard size budget); when skipped, remove only background-url/background-size/background-repeat/background-position, keep background-color #faa31b and headline/button color/radius identical.

findings.description: The asset-provenance clause ('do not re-host or recolor' the specific S3-hosted PNG) is a distinct brand-asset governance constraint (asset integrity/non-derivative use) that risks being merged into general layout text rather than tracked as its own hard prohibition with the asset URL as scope.

payload.statement: Do not re-host or recolor the Gradient_callout.png background asset; use only the canonical S3 URL as-is.

findings.description: The MJML code block is a concrete reference implementation of the layout/button/radius rules and should be linked via relation (implements/example_of) to the corresponding rule rows rather than left unassociated, since no rules currently exist to relate it to.
